buyer_guidance: Use this surface for inventory, order, and fulfillment coordination workflows. Treat it as a business-system integration rather than a telemetry feed. Coupa should be treated as a rest api surface for supply-chain records and fulfillment coordination.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Coupa Core REST API is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as supply-chain records and fulfillment coordination, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
